curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies only plugin/YPTSocket/MessageSQLiteV2.php::onOpen, adding URL validation for selfURI and htmlspecialchars sanitization for page_title. Sibling files MessageSQLite.php and Message.php in the same directory contain identical onOpen handlers with the same unsanitized webSocketSelfURI and page_title persistence pattern (utf8_encode instead of htmlspecialchars). Pre-assigned vulnerability class xss confirmed: CWE-79 matches the stored DOM XSS described in the advisory and evident in the patch diff.
